basic.description: Return a basic payload that omits the heavy `filters`, `query`, and `groups` fields. Useful for pickers that only need id/name/count.

hide_behavioral_cohorts.description: Set true to exclude behavioral (event-based) cohorts — not usable in batch workflow audiences.

limit.description: Number of results to return per page.

offset.description: The initial index from which to return the results.

search.description: Find cohorts by name. Fuzzy trigram match (tolerates typos and partial words), exact matches ordered first.
